titleStmt.title: SII 41.255: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 255. (A.R. No. 473 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: States that Sūrappa-timmarasaiyar, the executive agent of Amaram Timmarasayaṅgār ordered the remission of the nīrkūli tax on some land at Sakkiranallūr which was the service tenure (sēvagamāniyam) of a temple girl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kiṣṇārāyakālattu vikkiṟama varuṣam paṅkuṉimātam 3 teti Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkā Uṭaiya nāyiṉār śrīkāriyañceyvār śrīmatu Amaram timmaracayaṅkār kāriyattukku kaṭavar cūrappa timmaracaiyarum (tāṉa) tāṉattārum cilācātaṉam paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭi cakkiṟanallūril tevaraṭiyar cevaka māṉiyattukku ṉiṟkūlikku cevakattukku Orupaṇam koḷḷukaiyil Anta paṇam veṇṭā(m)meṉṟu caṟuvamāṉṉiyamāka viṭṭu yim muṟai Ācantira Ātittavaraiyum naṭakkakkaṭavo(m)mākavum Atikāri
Ivai Aṉṉamaracar Eḻuttu Ivai kuḻāṇṭār Attamuḻār Eḻuttu Ivai kecaveṭṭai kuḻāṇṭār Eḻuttu Ivai vaḻutippaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai caṅkarapaṭṭar Eḻuttu (ivai) Ippaṭikku Ivai Ammaiappaveḷār cittirakuttar Eḻuttu Ivai Ammayppaveḷāṉ kailāyam Eḻuttu§
Digital edition of SII 41.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
